name: SiriusVision CO., LTD.
summary: SiriusVision CO., LTD. manufactures and sells image inspection equipment, image inspection software, and image inspection related products in Japan and internationally. The company offers pad printing, hot stamping, roll transfer, and screen printing machines, as well as air-heat transfer systems; on-demand transfer foil printers; ink-jet printers, such as UV inkjet printers; and surface modification devices. It also provides in-mold systems and foil feeding devices; image inspection systems; and spare parts/consumable for pad printing and hot stamping machines. The company was formerly known as Navitas Co., Ltd. and changed its name to SiriusVision CO., LTD. in January 2021. SiriusVision CO., LTD. was founded in 1966 and is headquartered in Yokohama, Japan.
